Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831844278386.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

00000006831844278386.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

dummyKey.title: Bounty Select-A-Size Double Roll Paper Towels, 2-ply, 82 Sheets/Roll, 12 Rolls/Pack (66541/06130)

paragraph: Spilled your drink? Quick! The Quicker Picker Upper. Be ready to tackle messes and spills with Bounty Paper Towels! Each sheet is 2x more absorbent, so you can use less and pick up spills and messes quicker than the leading ordinary brand. That’s why Bounty is the Quicker Picker Upper!
bullets: Kitchen Roll Towel
2-Ply Thickness
Pack contains 12 Double Rolls, 82 Sheets/Roll (984 total sheets)
12 Double Rolls = 24 Regular Rolls
More absorbent so you can use less* *vs. leading ordinary brand
With Select-A-Size rolls you can choose your sheet size based on the size of your mess
Most Awarded Paper Towel* *based on online media awards for the past 6 years
Picks up messes quicker* *vs. leading ordinary brand
Now more clothlike* *vs. previous product
Why use more when you can use less* *vs. leading ordinary brand
headliner: Select-A-Size feature lets you use only however much is required and save the rest for later use.
expandedDescr: Bounty Paper Towels are available in two sheet sizes, Full Sheet and Select-A-Size, so you can choose which option works best for you. Bounty Select-A-Size towels are versatile, so you can choose your sheet size depending on your mess. And if you’re buying the bigger packs, you’ll always have Bounty on hand. Bounty has a variety of pack and roll sizes to fit your needs. Bounty products are proudly made with American jobs and we’re fully committed to creating solutions for a sustainable future. Across all our products, we consider the impact on people, forests, and the world. That’s why for every tree we use, at least two are regrown so you can conveniently and confidently clean messes in the kitchen and around the house knowing Bounty Paper Towels is helping to keep forests greener. Bounty always has your back in and out of the kitchen so whether it’s juice on the counter or ice cream on the table, we make sure spills won’t stand a chance. *vs. leading ordinary brand

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These lemon scented wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free.
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills.
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything.
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients:Active n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Warnings: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

Safety Data Sheet

paragraph: Spilled your drink? Quick! The Quicker Picker Upper. Be ready to tackle messes and spills with Bounty Paper Towels! Each sheet is 2x more absorbent, so you can use less and pick up spills and messes quicker than the leading ordinary brand. That’s why Bounty is the Quicker Picker Upper!
bullets: Kitchen Roll Towel
2-Ply Thickness
Pack contains 12 Double Rolls, 82 Sheets/Roll (984 total sheets)
12 Double Rolls = 24 Regular Rolls
More absorbent so you can use less* *vs. leading ordinary brand
With Select-A-Size rolls you can choose your sheet size based on the size of your mess
Most Awarded Paper Towel* *based on online media awards for the past 6 years
Picks up messes quicker* *vs. leading ordinary brand
Now more clothlike* *vs. previous product
Why use more when you can use less* *vs. leading ordinary brand
headliner: Select-A-Size feature lets you use only however much is required and save the rest for later use.
expandedDescr: Bounty Paper Towels are available in two sheet sizes, Full Sheet and Select-A-Size, so you can choose which option works best for you. Bounty Select-A-Size towels are versatile, so you can choose your sheet size depending on your mess. And if you’re buying the bigger packs, you’ll always have Bounty on hand. Bounty has a variety of pack and roll sizes to fit your needs. Bounty products are proudly made with American jobs and we’re fully committed to creating solutions for a sustainable future. Across all our products, we consider the impact on people, forests, and the world. That’s why for every tree we use, at least two are regrown so you can conveniently and confidently clean messes in the kitchen and around the house knowing Bounty Paper Towels is helping to keep forests greener. Bounty always has your back in and out of the kitchen so whether it’s juice on the counter or ice cream on the table, we make sure spills won’t stand a chance. *vs. leading ordinary brand

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831846530918.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831846687865.title: CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes, Lemon Fresh, 75 Wipes/Container (15948)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These lemon scented wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free.
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills.
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything.
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients:Active n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Warnings: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

Safety Data Sheet

00000006831846687865.title: CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes, Lemon Fresh, 75 Wipes/Container (15948)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These lemon scented wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free.
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills.
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything.
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients:Active n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Warnings: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

Safety Data Sheet

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase

Obscene or discriminatory language;

Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or

00000009370547529663.title: Dawn Platinum Dish Soap Refill, Fresh Rain, 51.5 oz., 2/Pack (44968/04504)

paragraph: Dawn Platinum removes 99% of Grease and Food Residue with less scrubbing than before. That's because Dawn Platinum attracts grease like a magnet to give you a squeaky clean feel that you can see and feel. From crusty casserole dishes to grimy skillets, Dawn dishwashing liquid is a household essential that leaves all your dishes looking spotless and shiny. And to make sure you’re always stocked up on Dawn, you’ll love our dish soap refill jug. It’s the same powerful Dawn Platinum you trust, in a value size that saves you money* and saves plastic when refilling (*when comparing $/oz within same sub-brand). The easy-pour spout and comfortable handle make it simple to refill your standard or EZ-Squeeze bottle—mess free! Tough on grease yet designed to be gentle on hands, no wonder Dawn is still the only brand trusted by wildlife rescue workers* to safely clean animals impacted by oil spills (*International Bird Rescue uses Dawn). And Dawn dish soap is a versatile whole-house cleaner—from cookware to grills, tire rims, and outdoor furniture, Dawn dish soap liquid tackles grease wherever it tries to hide. See for yourself why Dawn is The Better Grease Getter.
bullets: NEW & IMPROVED FORMULA: New Dawn Platinum is now stronger* on tough grease, so you can spend less time washing dishes (*vs. previous formula)
REMOVES TOUGH GREASE: Dawn Platinum removes 99% of Grease and Food Residue for a squeaky clean you can see and feel
SCRUB LESS AND CLEAN FASTER*: Dawn Platinum dish soap attracts grease like a magnet so you can scrub less and clean faster* (*vs. previous formula)
REFILL WITHOUT THE SPILL: Our new and improved jug features an easy-pour spout and comfortable handle to make refilling any Dawn dish soap bottle easier, faster, and less messy *vs. our previous jug.

SAME CLEAN, BETTER VALUE: Save money* and save plastic when refilling with our dish soap refill jug (*when comparing $/oz within same sub-brand). You can fill multiple standard or EZ-Squeeze bottles with just one jug of Dawn liquid soap refill.
SAVES WILDLIFE: Dawn dish soap is the only brand trusted by rescue workers* to clean wildlife impacted by oil spills. (*International Bird Rescue uses Dawn Platinum)
CLEANS BEYOND THE SINK: Use Dawn Platinum to pre-treat laundry stains, to clean greasy tools and car wheels, and to remove grease and grime from around the house.
AMERICA’S FAVORITE DISH SOAP: Dawn is the #1 dishwashing liquid brand in North America* (*Based on Sales)
headliner: Grease doesn’t stand a chance. New Dawn Platinum is stronger on tough grease (vs. previous formula) to melt away stubborn messes with ease.

Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831850261150.title: Brother TN-850 Black Toner High Yield Cartridge, 2/Pack (TN8502PK)

paragraph: Brother TN8502PK black toner cartridges produce crisp, sharp prints that withstand the test of time. Intelligently engineered to work in seamless unison with your Brother printer, these toner cartridges offer professional mono laser print quality you can consistently rely on for up to 8000 pages*.
bullets: Compatible with Brother DCP-L5500DN, DCP-L5600DN, DCP-L5650DN, HL-L5000D, HL-L5100DN, HL-L5200DW, HL-L5200DWT, HL-L6200DW, HL-L6200DWT, HL-L6250DW, HL-L6300DW, HL-L6400DW, HL-L6400DWT, MFC-L5700DW, MFC-L5800DW, MFC-L5850DW, MFC-L5900DW, MFC-L6700DW, MFC-L6750DW, MFC-L6800DW, MFC-L6900DW
Page Yield of up to 8,000 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine TN8502PK High-Yield 2 Pack Black Ink Cartridges.
Brother Genuine Multi-Pack Toner TN8502PK High-Yield Black Toner Cartridges.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19752 (letter/A4).
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

paragraph: Expect high-quality results for home and office documents with this printer paper. This 20 lb. weight paper is engineered to prevent jamming, making it ideal for use in all machines. With a 92 brightness rating, this paper delivers crisp text and images in black and white. Featuring 3600 sheets, this Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper provides the right amount to keep up with your daily demand.
bullets: Copy printer paper that is best for high volume, black & white printing
Paper weight: 20 lbs.
Sheet Dimension: 8.5W" x 11"L (US Letter)
Brightness rating of 92 for sharp, clear print results
White paper with a Matte finish
600 sheets per ream, 6 reams per carton, 3600 sheets total
Paper is acid-free to prevent crumbling or yellowing
Engineered to prevent jamming
Designed for high-speed printers
headliner: Keep your copy room stocked with this 6-ream carton of Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper to handle everyday printing.

paragraph: Expect high-quality results for home and office documents with this printer paper. This 20 lb. weight paper is engineered to prevent jamming, making it ideal for use in all machines. Featuring 3600 sheets, this Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper provides the right amount to keep up with your daily demand.

White paper with a Matte finish
600 sheets per ream, 6 reams per carton, 3600 sheets total
Paper is acid-free to prevent crumbling or yellowing
Engineered to prevent jamming
Designed for high-speed printers
headliner: Keep your copy room stocked with this 6-ream carton of Tru Red 8.5" x 11" white printer paper to handle everyday printing.

00000006831852163629.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

00000006831852163629.title: Brother TN-223 Black/Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 4/Pack (TN2234PK)

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

paragraph: Brother TN2234PK four-pack of genuine standard-yield toner cartridges contains one cartridge each of black, cyan, magenta, and yellow toner that deliver consistent, professional laser-quality prints you can rely on for up to 1400 pages* per black cartridge and up to 1300 pages* per each color cartridge. The Brother four-pack of laser cartridges offers the convenience of having extra toner cartridges on hand. Brother toner is intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with your Brother printer to consistently deliver rich, vivid laser-quality color prints and sharp, crisp black and white laser-quality prints that withstand the test of time. Use of Brother multipack laser toner offers convenience and helps minimize the number of repeat toner orders you need to place.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Black - Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages* per cartridge; Color - Page Yield of up to 1,300 pages* per cartridge
Multi-pack - 4 individual colors (Black, Cyan, Magenta, Yellow).
Brother Genuine TN223 4PK 4-Pack Toner Cartridges; includes 1 each of Black, Cyan, Magenta and Yellow.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/environment for more information.
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

00000006831861252734.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831865269257.title: Brother TN-223 Black Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, Print Up to 1,400 Pages (TN223BK)

paragraph: Brother Genuine TN-223BK Standard Yield Black Toner Cartridges deliver professional prints with up to 1,400-page yield.* Intelligently engineered to work with Brother printers for superior results.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L3210CW, HL-L3230CDW, HL-L3270CDW, HL-L3290CDW, MFC-L3710CW, MFC-L3750CDW and MFC-L3770CDW.
Standard Yield Black Toner Cartridge
Page Yield of up to 1,400 pages*
Intelligently engineered as part of a complete printing system to work seamlessly with your Brother printer
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
headliner: Experience consistent, high-quality printing results with this Brother TN223 black toner cartridge.
expandedDescr: Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message1: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days once processing is complete.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Please feel free to
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Package your items using the original box or any package suitable for shipping and affix the shipping label to the outside of the box.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831867739512.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days after your return is processed.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message1: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days once processing is complete.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.refund.message2: Refund will post to your account in 3-5 business days.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Please feel free to
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Pick up instructions
Print your shipping label.
Package your items using the original box or any package suitable for shipping and affix the shipping label to the outside of the box.
Insert packing slip inside the package with the item being returned.

Wait for pickup. Your item(s) will be picked up within 1 to 5 business days after your return was submitted between the hours of 9am and 5pm. You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006831867739598.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

dummyKeyMEMBERSHIP_PROGRAM.title: Staples Plus Membership

bullets: Free delivery no minimum. Exclusions apply.
$35.99 paper – everyday.
10% back in rewards on ink & toner.
Guaranteed lowest prices on your 5 favorites.
headliner: Big Savings for Small Business
expandedDescr: Once enrolled as a Staples Plus member, your new paid membership benefits replace any savings you may have received as an existing rewards program member (up to and including instant savings or rewards savings benefits). Your business exclusive pricing and custom picks are available in store and online (subject to product availability and selection) – simply reference your Rewards member number when shopping. Members have a quantity limit of 20 units per selected item per calendar month at their special pricing rate. Members have the option to change 1 one of their 5 specially priced items every 90 days.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

dummyKey.title: Brother LC103 Black High Yield Ink Cartridge (LC103BKS)

paragraph: Produce archival-quality documents with this long-lasting ink cartridge. Crafted to work with select Brother inkjet printers in seamless unison, this ink cartridge is simple to install and produces high-quality results. This Brother high-yield ink cartridge has a production capacity of 600 pages and features black ink, delivering bold, sharp text, making it ideal for printing contracts, reports and other documents.
bullets: Compatible with: Brother DCP-J152W, MFC-J245, MFC-J285DW, MFC-J4310DW, MFC-J4410DW, MFC-J450DW, MFC-J4510DW, MFC-J4510N, MFC-J4610DW, MFC-J470DW, MFC-J4710DW, MFC-J475DW, MFC-J650DW
High Yield Ink Cartridge
Yield of up to 600 pages*.
Intelligently engineered to work in seamless unison with your Brother inkjet printer.
Brother Genuine LC103BK Standard-Yield Black Ink Cartridge.
Brother Genuine ink produces sharp prints that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way for customers to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/Environment to learn more.
headliner: Cover printing needs in the classroom, home or small office with this Brother LC103 high-yield black ink cartridge.
expandedDescr:
a href="http://sds.staples.com/msds/952621.pdf" target="_blank"Safety Data Sheet/a

Disclaimer: *All page yields are approximate and are calculated in accordance with ISO/IEC 24711; for additional page yield info, see manufacturer’s website.

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center

dummyKeySTORE.title: Brother LC103 Black High Yield Ink Cartridge (LC103BKS)

paragraph: Produce archival-quality documents with this long-lasting ink cartridge. Crafted to work with select Brother inkjet printers in seamless unison, this ink cartridge is simple to install and produces high-quality results. This Brother high-yield ink cartridge has a production capacity of 600 pages and features black ink, delivering bold, sharp text, making it ideal for printing contracts, reports and other documents.
bullets: Compatible with: Brother DCP-J152W, MFC-J245, MFC-J285DW, MFC-J4310DW, MFC-J4410DW, MFC-J450DW, MFC-J4510DW, MFC-J4510N, MFC-J4610DW, MFC-J470DW, MFC-J4710DW, MFC-J475DW, MFC-J650DW
High Yield Ink Cartridge
Yield of up to 600 pages*.
Intelligently engineered to work in seamless unison with your Brother inkjet printer.
Brother Genuine LC103BK Standard-Yield Black Ink Cartridge.
Brother Genuine ink produces sharp prints that withstand the test of time.
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way for customers to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/Environment to learn more.
headliner: Cover printing needs in the classroom, home or small office with this Brother LC103 high-yield black ink cartridge.
expandedDescr:
a href="http://sds.staples.com/msds/952621.pdf" target="_blank"Safety Data Sheet/a

Disclaimer: *All page yields are approximate and are calculated in accordance with ISO/IEC 24711; for additional page yield info, see manufacturer’s website.

paragraph: Produce archival-quality documents with this long-lasting ink cartridge. Crafted to work with select Brother inkjet printers in seamless unison, this ink cartridge is simple to install and produces high-quality results. This Brother high-yield ink cartridge has a production capacity of 600 pages and features black ink, delivering bold, sharp text, making it ideal for printing contracts, reports and other documents.

Brother Genuine LC103BK Standard-Yield Black Ink Cartridge.

Brother offers an environmentally responsible way for customers to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges. Visit www.brother-usa.com/Environment to learn more.

headliner: Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling In-Ear Earbuds
expandedDescr: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source. These wireless earbuds use immersive sound to bring the music from inside your head – right in front of you. And for the noises you don’t want to hear, the QC Ultra Earbuds offer world-class noise cancelation. The CustomTune technology analyzes your ear’s shape and adapts the sound and noise cancelling to it. The innovation doesn’t just stop at the premium sound, the design of these in-ear headphones is a one-of-a-kind experience too. You get nine combinations of eartip and stability band sizes to choose from. And up to six hours of play time (up to 4 hours with Immersive Audio)* keeps your favorite music playing as long as you want. The included case holds up to three additional charges. Connect to your devices with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and keep track of what you have paired in the Bose Music app. It also walks you through setup, lets you customize a shortcut, and access Adjustable EQ settings.

dummyKeySTORE.title: Green Mountain Dark Magic Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Dark Roast, 48/Box (81911/15171)

paragraph: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind our coffee. We work alongside farmers who’ve cultivated coffee for centuries. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of dark roast Dark Magic single serve K-Cup pods — Certified Orthodox Union Kosher.
bullets: COFFEE: Farm-grown goodness that’s expertly crafted, smooth, and balanced.
NOTES: Green Mountain Coffee Roasters Dark Magic delivers bold flavors of dried fruit and bittersweet dark chocolate.
SUSTAINABILITY: Good coffee done right. 100% responsibly sourced and Certified Orthodox Union Kosher — so you can feel great about every cup.
COMPATIBILITY: Contains genuine Keurig K-Cup pods, engineered for guaranteed quality and compatibility with all Keurig single serve coffee makers.
VARIETY: Hot or iced. Decaf or full strength. Flavored or black. However you brew, we’ve got a cup for you.
48 K-Cup® Pods/Box
headliner: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind our coffee. We work alongside farmers who’ve cultivated coffee for centuries. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of dark roast Dark Magic single serve K-Cup pods — Certified Orthodox Union Kosher.
expandedDescr: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind every perfect cup of coffee. But every story begins the same — with farmers. The true magic of coffee begins in the soil. That’s why we work alongside farmers like Rafael Costa, whose family has cultivated coffee for centuries, passing down knowledge as rich as the soil itself. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. Healthier soil can foster stronger, more resilient coffee plants, leading to better harvests. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of Dark Magic. As deep as the night itself, the intense taste of this extra bold blend is enlivened by notes of dried fruit and bittersweet dark chocolate. Dark Magic is Certified Orthodox Union Kosher and grown and sold in adherence to credible sourcing programs that align with our company’s Responsible Sourcing Guidelines. These single serve K-Cup pods are compatible with all Keurig single serve coffee makers. Each K-Cup pod is filled with the freshest dark roast ground coffee and brews a flavorful cup of coffee every time. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done, please empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in many communities.

Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

paragraph: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source.
bullets: Quiet and Aware Modes
Dynamic Mic Mixing for Clear Calls
Bluetooth 5.3 Connectivity, Up to 30'
Supports SimpleSync and Bose Music App
Immersive, Spatial Audio Mode
Passive and Active Noise Cancellation
IPX4-Rated Water and Sweat Resistance
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling In-Ear Earbuds
expandedDescr: Feel your music more. With the Bose QuietComfort Ultra True Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones, you get breakthrough spatial audio for more natural-sounding music, no matter the source. These wireless earbuds use immersive sound to bring the music from inside your head – right in front of you. And for the noises you don’t want to hear, the QC Ultra Earbuds offer world-class noise cancelation. The CustomTune technology analyzes your ear’s shape and adapts the sound and noise cancelling to it. The innovation doesn’t just stop at the premium sound, the design of these in-ear headphones is a one-of-a-kind experience too. You get nine combinations of eartip and stability band sizes to choose from. And up to six hours of play time (up to 4 hours with Immersive Audio)* keeps your favorite music playing as long as you want. The included case holds up to three additional charges. Connect to your devices with advanced Bluetooth 5.3 and keep track of what you have paired in the Bose Music app. It also walks you through setup, lets you customize a shortcut, and access Adjustable EQ settings.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.hass: We have received your return and are processing it. Once the return is complete, you will receive an email containing your refund details.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

00000006831955952397.title: Dunkin' Original Blend Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Medium Roast, 88/Carton (400845)

paragraph: Enjoy traditional coffee shop flavor with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods. The medium-roast beans deliver a rich, smooth taste, and the K-Cup format lets you brew coffee one mug at a time. This 88-count package, makes them ideal for stocking break rooms, office kitchens and reception areas.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
88 K-Cups per carton
Orthodox Union Kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Give staff and guests a delicious beverage option with these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' Original Blend coffee pods.
expandedDescr: INTRODUCING RECYCLABLE* K-CUP PODS: Simple. Delicious. And now Recyclable. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done just peel, empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in all communities. Packaging may vary.

00000006831969214887.title: Duracell AA NiMH Battery, rechargeable, 4/Pack (DX1500B4N001)

paragraph: With its Ion Core technology you get amazing power in every battery. Plus, they come pre-charged and ready to use. They are guaranteed to last for 10 years* in storage and they will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use. These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times. *or up to 400 recharges, whichever comes first.
bullets: DURACELL AA RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: The Duracell Rechargeable AA battery is designed for use in video game controllers, wireless electronics, baby monitors, and more.
RECHARGEABLE BATTERIES: These powerful NiMH batteries work in any NiMH charger and you can recharge them up to 400 times, helping save you money.
LONG LASTING CHARGE: Designed and developed with Ion Core technology. You can get hundreds of cycles out of each Duracell Rechargeable battery.
GUARANTEED FOR 10 YEARS IN STORAGE: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are guaranteed to perform for up to 10 years in storage* in storage and will hold a charge for up to 1 year when not in use.
#1 TRUSTED BATTERY BRAND: Duracell Rechargeable batteries are available in Double A (AA) and Triple A (AAA) sizes.
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Duracell Rechargeable Pre-Charged NiMH batteries let you charge hundreds of times, helping you save money.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase

If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

00000006831994938918.title: Green Mountain Dark Magic Coffee Keurig® K-Cup® Pods, Dark Roast, 48/Box (81911/15171)

paragraph: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind our coffee. We work alongside farmers who’ve cultivated coffee for centuries. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of dark roast Dark Magic single serve K-Cup pods — Certified Orthodox Union Kosher.
bullets: COFFEE: Farm-grown goodness that’s expertly crafted, smooth, and balanced.
NOTES: Green Mountain Coffee Roasters Dark Magic delivers bold flavors of dried fruit and bittersweet dark chocolate.
SUSTAINABILITY: Good coffee done right. 100% responsibly sourced and Certified Orthodox Union Kosher — so you can feel great about every cup.
COMPATIBILITY: Contains genuine Keurig K-Cup pods, engineered for guaranteed quality and compatibility with all Keurig single serve coffee makers.
VARIETY: Hot or iced. Decaf or full strength. Flavored or black. However you brew, we’ve got a cup for you.
48 K-Cup® Pods/Box
headliner: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind our coffee. We work alongside farmers who’ve cultivated coffee for centuries. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of dark roast Dark Magic single serve K-Cup pods — Certified Orthodox Union Kosher.
expandedDescr: At Green Mountain Coffee Roasters, there’s a story behind every perfect cup of coffee. But every story begins the same — with farmers. The true magic of coffee begins in the soil. That’s why we work alongside farmers like Rafael Costa, whose family has cultivated coffee for centuries, passing down knowledge as rich as the soil itself. Together, we support practices that advance soil conservation. Healthier soil can foster stronger, more resilient coffee plants, leading to better harvests. All while bringing you the bold, complex flavors of Dark Magic. As deep as the night itself, the intense taste of this extra bold blend is enlivened by notes of dried fruit and bittersweet dark chocolate. Dark Magic is Certified Orthodox Union Kosher and grown and sold in adherence to credible sourcing programs that align with our company’s Responsible Sourcing Guidelines. These single serve K-Cup pods are compatible with all Keurig single serve coffee makers. Each K-Cup pod is filled with the freshest dark roast ground coffee and brews a flavorful cup of coffee every time. Enjoy the same great-tasting coffee you know and love, and when you’re done, please empty and recycle. *Check locally, not recycled in many communities.

00000006831994938918.title: Astrobrights Colored Paper, 24 lbs., 8.5" x 11", Assorted Galactic Blues, 100 Sheets/Ream (91529)

paragraph: For projects that are out of this world, the Astrobrights Galactic Blues colored paper is the perfect choice. Each sheet of this monochromatic Astrobrights paper pack is 20% thicker than standard paper, so you can achieve bleed-free results for single- and double-sided documents. Creative geniuses and novices alike can create vibrant brochures, school projects, signs, coupons, and DIY paper crafting. Plus, this colored paper saves money on pricey full-color ink while acting as the perfect canvas. The Astrobrights paper is also lignin- and acid-free, so your creations won't yellow over time. Brighter colors. Brighter ideas.
bullets: Enhance your documents, flyers, crafting, school projects, color-coding, and DIY crafting with five bright colors: Lunar Blue, Celestial Blue, Breezy Blue, Proton Periwinkle, and Terrestrial Teal
24 lb. paper is 20% thicker than standard paper
Dimensions: 8.5" x 11"
100 sheets per pack (20 sheets of each color)
Acid- and lignin-free for long-lasting results that won't disintegrate or yellow over time
Meets or exceeds the FSC standard
Dyed throughout for seamless cutting, folding, and tearing, without a white core
Printing on colored paper gives you all the benefits of color without the high cost and extra time of printing with colored ink
