paragraph: For projects that are out of this world, the Astrobrights Galactic Blues colored paper is the perfect choice. Each sheet of this monochromatic Astrobrights paper pack is 20% thicker than standard paper, so you can achieve bleed-free results for single- and double-sided documents. Creative geniuses and novices alike can create vibrant brochures, school projects, signs, coupons, and DIY paper crafting. Plus, this colored paper saves money on pricey full-color ink while acting as the perfect canvas. The Astrobrights paper is also lignin- and acid-free, so your creations won't yellow over time. Brighter colors. Brighter ideas.
bullets: Enhance your documents, flyers, crafting, school projects, color-coding, and DIY crafting with five bright colors: Lunar Blue, Celestial Blue, Breezy Blue, Proton Periwinkle, and Terrestrial Teal
24 lb. paper is 20% thicker than standard paper
Dimensions: 8.5" x 11"
100 sheets per pack (20 sheets of each color)
Acid- and lignin-free for long-lasting results that won't disintegrate or yellow over time
Meets or exceeds the FSC standard
Dyed throughout for seamless cutting, folding, and tearing, without a white core
Printing on colored paper gives you all the benefits of color without the high cost and extra time of printing with colored ink

We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

00000006832007011994.title: Scotch Sure Start Packing Tape, 1.88" x 54.6 yds., Clear (3450)

restrictionDetails.description: Out of stock for delivery to your shipping location.

paragraph: The search is over with Scotch Sure Start Shipping Packing Tape. This tough, strong tape comes off the roll easily and smoothly with no slivering or splitting. This tape also delivers a smooth and quiet unwind, and when it quietly unwinds off the roll (using the uniquely designed refillable dispenser, included) and is applied to your package, it stays on—keeping your package securely sealed. Clear to the core, Scotch Sure Start Packaging Tape works beautifully for home and office. It stands up to rough handling—but so easy to handle. Scotch Sure Start Shipping Packaging Tape—always easy, always ready to help you get the job done.
bullets: Easy start every time
Clear when applied to boxes
Hot melt adhesive seals securely and ensures you don’t need layers of tape
Seals packages quietly and easily
Unwinds smoothly and quietly
Strong, durable hot melt adhesive keeps packages secure
Tough 2.6 mil thickness takes on rough handling
Resists splintering, slivering, tearing
Smooth and quiet unwind perfect for office settings
Available in multiple sizes and packouts
Clear to the core
Made locally, with globally sourced materials
headliner: When you’re in the middle of packing boxes, the last thing you want to do is search endlessly for the end of the tape.

paragraph: Create notes that last with the fade-resistant, water-resistant ink in these permanent markers. The chisel tips are extra wide, so you can easily make bold, highly-visible lines, and the aluminum barrels stand up to rough handling. These Sharpie Magnum black permanent markers come in a box of 12, making it simple to supply them to multiple workers at once.
bullets: Permanent ink formula is designed to last
Black ink markers are indispensable office supplies
Extra wide jumbo chisel tip
A dozen markers per pack
As these markers are non-toxic, they are extremely safe to use
headliner: Write notes on wood, stone, leather, and other surfaces easily with this box of 12 Sharpie Magnum black permanent markers.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.retu: Please call customer service to complete this return.
Next steps:
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: A return specialist will contact you within 3 business days to provide you with expectations for your return and refund.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cred: No action is needed from you.  You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.unde: We are unable to deliver your items and they have been returned to the warehouse. You will receive an email with your refund details.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.cust: You do not need to return the following item(s). You will receive a credit email with your refund details.
Please feel free to
Keep product and use at your discretion or
Donate the product to a worthy cause or
Discard the product, if recyclable please dispose of correctly
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.

44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

paragraph: Enjoy the smooth, classic taste of these Dunkin' original blend coffee pods. Each one is fully caffeinated to deliver a surge of energy, while the original blend provides a rich, silky experience. There are 44 of these Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' coffee pods in each pack, so you can share them with friends, family and coworkers.
bullets: Coffee K-Cups for Keurig brewers
Medium-roast coffee with Original Blend flavor
44 K-Cups per box
The product is kosher
Made with 100% Arabica coffee
headliner: Restock coffee supplies in break rooms, waiting rooms or your home with this 44-count Keurig K-Cup Dunkin' original blend coffee pods.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.

paragraph: Organize and maintain multipage documents with these standard staples. The standard tips are great for everyday document binding needs, while the galvanized wire coating offers reliable performance and strength. Pry out the staples quickly with standard flat-type removers for efficiency. With 5000 staples per box, these Staples Standard staples provide an ample supply for lasting use.

5000 staples per box

paragraph: Organize and maintain multipage documents with these standard staples. The standard tips are great for everyday document binding needs, while the galvanized wire coating offers reliable performance and strength. Pry out the staples quickly with standard flat-type removers for efficiency. With 5000 staples per box, these Staples Standard staples provide an ample supply for lasting use.
bullets: Staples provide 20-page capacity
1/4" leg length
Standard staples
Paper quality staples are made to penetrate paper without jamming
5000 staples per box
For use with standard desktop staplers
headliner: Refill stapler units around the office with this 5000-box of Staples Standard staples.

Keep product and use at your discretion or

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.

You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

paragraph: Organize and maintain multipage documents with these standard staples. The standard tips are great for everyday document binding needs, while the galvanized wire coating offers reliable performance and strength. Pry out the staples quickly with standard flat-type removers for efficiency. With 5000 staples per box, these Staples Standard staples provide an ample supply for lasting use.

messages.ptd.reviews.writeareview.community.guide: Community Guidelines & Terms of Use
We value your input and invite you to rate and review your purchase
Be sure to explain why you like or dislike the product and focus on the product features and your own experience using it.
If you have a comment about product selection, pricing, ordering, delivery or other issues, please contact our
Please refrain from including any of the following in your review
Obscene or discriminatory language;
Critical or inappropriate comments about other reviews and shoppers;
Advertising, spam, references to other websites or retailer; or
Any Personal information, such as email addresses, phone numbers or physical addresses.
All reviews are subject to these

dummyKey.title: Staples Standard Staples, 1/4" Leg Length, 5000 /Box (TR58090)

paragraph: Organize and maintain multipage documents with these standard staples. The standard tips are great for everyday document binding needs, while the galvanized wire coating offers reliable performance and strength. Pry out the staples quickly with standard flat-type removers for efficiency. With 5000 staples per box, these Staples Standard staples provide an ample supply for lasting use.
bullets: Staples provide 20-page capacity
1/4" leg length
Standard staples
Paper quality staples are made to penetrate paper without jamming
5000 staples per box
For use with standard desktop staplers
headliner: Refill stapler units around the office with this 5000-box of Staples Standard staples.

messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: We will be sending a driver to collect your items. The driver will arrive soon as the next business day from when you placed your return or upto 5 business days.
Pick up instructions
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pack: Reuse your original box or any box suitable for shipping. Include any of the following in the box to expedite receiving your credit:
Printout of your return confirmation email
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.pick: Prepare for pick up
Leave the box where deliveries are typically made to your location. This could be the front door, side door. loading deck. or front desk of your building.
Wait for pick up

Your items will be picked up as early as the next business day after your return was placed between the hours of 9am to 5pm. If your return has not been picked up within 5 business days, please contact us for further assistance.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: To return your items, you will receive an email from pkinfo@ups.com with your UPS shipping label.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.refu: You will receive an email when Staples has issued your refund.
You will receive an email once your refund has been issued.
messages.ptd.od.shipment.returns.instruction.ship: UPS instructions
Prepare package
Cutout and secure your UPS shipping label to the box with packing tape. Remove other tracking labels or stickers.
Arrange for return
Send your box back to Staples using one of these shipping methods:
Take your box to a Staples store UPS Shipping Center
Give the labeled box to your UPS driver
Take it to a UPS Service Center location

paragraph: Highlight important passages or mark your place with these poly index tabs. Each tab in this 125-count pack is made from flexible poly material that resists moisture and tears for long-lasting durability. These self-adhesive flags stick securely in place but are easily removed and repositioned without leaving marks or residue. In five bright assorted colors, these Staples Stickies poly index tabs are perfect for labeling or color-coding materials for easy reference and location.
bullets: Page flags feature a writable surface to edit, label or jot notes
Create a color-coded indexing system with the included blue, green, orange, pink, and yellow flags
125 page flags per pack
Page flags measure 0.5"W
headliner: Mark important passages with this 125-count pack of Staples Stickies poly index tabs in bright colors.
expandedDescr:
When you need to alert your readers to changes in your documents or let someone know what needs to be done at a specific point in a document, use Staples Stickies page flags to get your message across. You can write any message on a flag and stick it on paper; once you are done, you just peel the flag off the paper.

Brightly Colored
Each package of 125 Staples Stickies® page flags includes blue, green, orange, yellow, and pink flags that are very easy to see, even when you stick them on colored paper. You can use different colored flags to color-code your messages.

Easy to Use
These flags are blank, so you can write any necessary message or information on the flag before you affix it to a document. When you no longer need the flag, you can easily peel it off without tearing the paper or leaving any adhesive residue behind.

Convenient Size
Each of these Staples Stickies® page flags is 1/2 inch high by 1 1/4 inch wide, so you have room to write an urgent message on it.
